summary: Bug fixes verified: (1) Service Console parallel API calls - page loads in ~3s instead of 30+s. (2) Dispatch email fallback - correctly resolves tech email from field_techs collection when ticket lacks tech_email. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Service Console loads with real Readisys data.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/service/console-data loads in < 5s (parallel API fix verified)
Backend: /api/service/console-data has stats object with expected fields
Backend: /api/service/field-techs returns array with name/email fields
Backend: POST /api/service/tickets/{id}/dispatch works with tech_email provided
Backend: POST /api/service/tickets/{id}/dispatch resolves email from field_techs when ticket lacks tech_email
Backend: Dispatch existing OPEN ticket without email resolves correctly
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid credentials
Frontend: Login flow works (heart click -> animation -> form -> hub)
Frontend: Service Console shows real subscriber data (37 subscribers, 511 AEDs need service)
Frontend: Stats cards display correctly (LOST CONTACT 143, NOT READY 141, EXPIRED B/P 203, EXPIRING B/P 24)
Frontend: Subscriber rows show with issue badges and action buttons
seed_data_creation: Created test tickets during dispatch tests (cleaned up after)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: (1) service_console_data() now fetches Readisys API endpoints in parallel using asyncio.gather() instead of sequentially - reduces load time from 30+s to ~3s. (2) dispatch_ticket() now looks up tech email from field_techs collection when ticket.tech_email is empty. Field techs in DB: Emily Davis (emily.davis@medtech.com), Test Tech (test@test.com). Existing tickets: SVC-260402D1F (DISPATCHED), SVC-260402104 (OPEN).

bug_1.issue: Service Console page taking 30+ seconds to load
bug_1.root_cause: Two Readisys API calls (status-overview and expiring-expired-bp) were made sequentially
bug_1.fix_applied: Changed to parallel API calls using asyncio.gather() in service_console_data() around line 1551

bug_2.issue: Dispatch email failing for older tickets without tech_email field
bug_2.root_cause: dispatch_ticket() only used tech_email from request/ticket, didn't fall back to field_techs lookup
bug_2.fix_applied: Added field_techs collection lookup when tech_email is empty in dispatch_ticket() around line 1757
bug_2.verification: Dispatch with empty tech_email correctly resolves to emily.davis@medtech.com for 'Emily Davis'
